data.title: package-lock.json version not updated during merge-to-main version bump
data.description: Root cause: Commit bebf7c9 (import progress UI merge from worktree-20260403-120548) bumped package.json to 0.5.0 but did not update package-lock.json — it still shows 0.4.0. The package-lock.json diff in that commit was +4/-4 lines, but those changes were for a dependency, not the version field. Main has been in this state since April 3rd. Any npm install on main regenerates package-lock.json with the correct 0.5.0 version, producing a dirty working tree that blocks the merge script. Fix: merge-to-main.sh version_bump phase should run npm install (or equivalent) after bumping package.json to sync package-lock.json.
